data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for specific task types: upload document, watch video, purchase item, confirm understanding. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that these task types are covered in the system. The linked use case describes tasks but does not explicitly mention the implementation of all required task types, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of task types: upload document, watch video, purchase item, confirm understanding being implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
